overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban street and alleyway. The player character walks under overpasses, past holographic advertisements, through a narrow alley with Japanese signage, and approaches a street intersection.

events.description: blue sports car drives past on the left side of the road
slight turn to the right while continuing forward along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the overpass, observing the neon-lit street

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving past on the road

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading CALIENTE on building facade
multiple illuminated advertising screens suspended over the street
concrete highway overpass covering the street
large pink and blue holographic display on building wall

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered commercial street beneath a massive overpass, surrounded by bright neon signage including a prominent CALIENTE sign. The environment features futuristic billboards and holographic advertisements while vehicles occasionally pass by on the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass with scattered debris and holographic art

events.description: passing a holographic wireframe statue on the right side
black SUV drives past on the road to the left

agents.ego_description: continuing walk under the darker overpass section, passing concrete pillars and scattered trash

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving past on the road

entered.detail: white translucent humanoid figure display on concrete pedestal
large structural columns holding up the overpass
litter and debris scattered across the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper under the overpass into a darker, grittier section characterized by massive concrete support pillars and scattered debris. A distinctive holographic wireframe statue stands on the right while traffic continues to pass on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with neon signs

events.description: entering narrow alley with distinctive orange textured pavement
passing under bright green neon open sign with Japanese characters

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alleyway, passing closed storefronts with vibrant neon lighting

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking away in the distance down the alley

entered.detail: tight corridor walls with industrial piping and panels
distinctive orange diamond-plate metal walkway covering the ground
green neon sign with Japanese characters 営業中 meaning open for business
rolled down security shutters on storefronts
cyan and pink neon light strips running vertically on building walls

segments.scene_description: Transitioning into a narrow enclosed alley with distinctive orange metal flooring and tightly packed walls. The space is illuminated by vibrant neon signage including a green Japanese open sign and vertical neon tubes, creating an intimate cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with bar and traffic

events.description: exiting narrow alley into wider street with visible traffic intersection
turquoise vintage car waiting at the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching street intersection, observing traffic and neon-lit bar on the right

notable_agents.action: turquoise vintage sedan waiting at the intersection traffic light

entered.detail: road crossing with traffic lights and multiple vehicle lanes
blue neon sign for bar establishment with glowing letters
black posts separating the sidewalk from the road

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow alley into a wider street approaching an intersection. A turquoise vintage car waits at the traffic light while neon bar signage illuminates the right side. The space opens up to reveal more of the urban infrastructure including protective bollards and overhead structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, commercial thoroughfare into a claustrophobic alleyway before emerging back into the open city. It begins under a massive overpass amidst glowing holographic advertisements and a prominent CALIENTE sign, with vehicles streaming past on a multi-lane road. As the camera moves deeper beneath the concrete structure, the environment shifts into a grittier zone defined by massive support pillars, scattered debris, and a holographic wireframe statue. The scene then tightens as the camera turns into a narrow enclosed alley with orange metal flooring, where the scale shrinks and the lighting becomes an intimate glow of green Japanese signage and vertical neon tubes. Finally, the space expands once more as the camera emerges from the alley toward a street intersection, passing a turquoise vintage car and neon bar signs under the sprawling urban infrastructure.
